title: Game Club: Turnip Boy Commits Tax Evasion
description:
Game Club is like a book club except we pick a game to play each month and then meet up to discuss it with a focus on game design. This month's game is ... Turnip Boy Commits Tax Evasion!

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313935700

title: Game Audio Club
description:
If you’re into making video game music or sound design (or just curious) come hang out with us once a month! Doesn’t matter if you’re a pro or just starting out— everyone’s welcome. Just bring your love for game audio.
We’re a chill group where you can share your work, get feedback, or just vibe with people who love game audio. 
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/314100367

title: Spring Game Jam Theme Reveal
description:
Join STLGameDev in challenging yourself to make a game over a week! It can be a board game or a video game, it's up to you! The Theme Reveal will be streamed online on Twitch.

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/314039471

title: Gamedev Work Night
description:
St. Louis County Library Clark Family branch is hosting casual work time for local game developers in the Creative Lab. Bring your project to work on and talk with other devs for feedback or fun. This is open to EVERYONE ages 14 and up. 
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313609823
location: St. Louis County Library - Clark Family branch - 1640 South Lindbergh Blvd - St. Louis, MO, us

title: Spring Game Jam Showcase and After-Party!
description:
Check out all of the games made over a week for our Spring Game Jam live in-person at 3pm at the Grand Glaize library! This event is FREE and open to anyone!

Join us afterward at 5:30pm at Dirty 20 for drinks (non-alcoholic options available), munchies, and merriment to celebrate a successful jam! ALL AGES ARE WELCOME, but minors must be accompanied by a parent/guardian and you will have to buy your own food/drinks.

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/314306211
location: Grand Glaize Library - 1010 Meramec Station Rd, Manchester MO - Ballwin, MO, us

title: May GameDev Social!
description:
Chat with fellow creators about making, playing, and admiring games! Talk about your game ideas and get inspired! Make friends and find collaborators. Our monthly hangout is open to EVERYONE!
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/312692352
location: Dirty 20 Bar - 14051 Manchester Rd - Ballwin, MO, us
